title: Blueberry Pet Essentials 10 Patterns Pink Flamingo on Light Emerald Adjustable Dog Collar, Small, Neck 12"-16"

variation_files.prompt: A close-up portrait of a fluffy white dog with perked ears and dark, expressive eyes, looking slightly to the side. The dog is wearing the dog collar around its neck, positioned just below the base of the ears. The background is a plain, solid white, creating a clean and minimalistic studio-style look. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the dog’s fur texture and facial features without harsh shadows. The collar is shown in place, fitting snugly, with the buckle and metal D-ring visible on the side. The overall composition focuses on the dog’s face and upper chest, emphasizing the collar as a natural part of the dog’s appearance.

title: Carhartt Firm Duck Dog Bed, Durable Canvas Pet Bed with Water-Repellent Shell, Carhartt Brown, Small

variation_files.prompt: A happy dog with a black and gray speckled coat and a tan collar is lying comfortably on the dog bed, resting its front paws on the edge. The dog bed is positioned on a concrete floor in a garage setting, with a blurred ATV visible in the background, including its large knobby tire and red taillight. The lighting is natural and diffused, highlighting the dog’s joyful expression with its mouth open and tongue out. The background is softly out of focus, emphasizing the dog and the dog bed in the foreground. The overall scene conveys a casual, rugged, and homey atmosphere.

title: Dog Shampoo by Bugalugs Lavender & Chamomile 4 in 1 Dog Grooming Shampoo Products for Smelly Dogs, Best Puppy Shampoo, Professional Groom Vegan pet Shampoo & Conditioner (1 Litre)

variation_files.prompt: A split-screen advertisement layout with a clean white background. On the left side, a bottle of the dog shampoo with a pump dispenser is shown upright, held by a human hand. The bottle is partially visible, with its label facing forward. On the right side, a close-up of a golden dog’s head is shown with closed eyes, appearing relaxed and content, as human hands gently lather its fur with white shampoo foam. The dog’s fur is wet and soapy, emphasizing the bathing action. Scattered around the image are small black line-drawn icons including paw prints, a bone, a flower, a comb, and scissors, arranged decoratively. The overall lighting is bright and even, creating a soft, clean, and gentle atmosphere

title: By Nature Pet Foods Dog Food Made in USA [Natural Dry Dog Food with Superfood Ingredients for Food Sensitivities and Immune Health], Chicken & Turkey Meal with Brown Rice Recipe, 44 lb. Bag (77080)

variation_files.prompt: A large orange bag of the dry dog food stands upright on a lush green lawn, centered between two dogs sitting on either side. The bag features a bright orange background with a white cloud-like design near the top, and a strip of green grass at the bottom. The dogs are seated on the grass, facing forward, with one on the left and one on the right of the bag. The background is a softly blurred outdoor scene with green foliage, suggesting a sunny garden or park. Natural daylight illuminates the scene evenly, casting soft shadows on the grass. The overall composition is balanced and centered, with the bag as the focal point flanked symmetrically by the two dogs.

A large bag of the dry dog food stands upright on a light wooden floor in a modern, bright kitchen. The bag is positioned in front of a white marble kitchen island with a polished surface, which features a beige handbag and a small woven basket with fruit placed on top. In the background, there are sleek white cabinetry, a large window letting in natural light, and dark gray bar stools with black metal legs tucked under the island. The scene is well-lit with soft, natural daylight, creating a clean and inviting domestic atmosphere. The product is centered in the foreground, with the kitchen elements softly blurred in the background to emphasize the bag.

title: PetPotion No Rinse, Waterless, Spray Shampoo for Dogs - All-Natural Waterless Spray Pet Bath - Odor Eliminating Dog Grooming Supplies - Pet Spray Deodorizer - Made in USA (Restore (Lavender) 10 oz)

variation_files.prompt: A clean, bright, light-blue background with soft, even lighting. On the left side, a happy black and white dog sits facing right, head tilted upward with mouth open in a joyful expression. In the center-right, the waterless dog shampoo stands upright. To the right of the product, a cluster of fresh lavender flowers with green stems and purple blooms extends upward. In the upper left corner, a small purple butterfly with white spots is floating. The entire composition is balanced and minimal, with no text or graphic elements other than the natural elements described.

A close-up shot of a small dog interacting with the dog toy on a plain white background. The dog is positioned slightly above and to the left of the toy, leaning forward with its front paws near the toy and its nose close to it, appearing to sniff or gently bite it. The dog’s head and upper body are in focus, showing its black, white, and tan fur, with expressive dark eyes. The dog toy is placed on the ground in the lower center of the frame, lying flat and slightly angled. The lighting is bright and even, creating soft shadows beneath the dog and the toy. The background is a seamless, solid white, with no text, graphics, or additional elements.

title: TRIXIE Pet Products Poker Box Vario Toy, Level 2

variation_files.prompt: The dog puzzle toy is placed centrally on a light-toned wooden floor with a natural wood grain pattern, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. The toy is shown in an active state, with one of its blue lids open, revealing a small compartment inside, and a few pieces of kibble visible within the toy’s mechanisms. The surrounding environment is minimal and clean, with soft, even lighting that highlights the toy’s form and the texture of the flooring. The background is softly blurred, drawing focus to the toy, and the overall composition suggests a calm, indoor domestic setting.

title: Pets First NFL Kansas City Chiefs HOT Dog Plush Dog & CAT Squeak Toy - Cutest HOT-Dog Snack Plush Toy for Dogs & Cats with Inner Squeaker & Beautiful Football Team Name/Logo 8 x 5 x 3 Inches

variation_files.prompt: A happy dog with a white and brown coat sits on a wooden park bench, looking directly at the camera with its mouth open and tongue out. In front of the dog, resting on the bench, is the plush toy shaped like a hot dog in a bun. The scene is outdoors in natural daylight, with soft sunlight casting gentle highlights on the dog and the bench. The background is softly blurred, showing green grass and hints of trees, creating a shallow depth of field that emphasizes the dog and the plush toy. The wooden bench has horizontal slats with a warm, natural wood finish. The overall composition is centered, with the dog positioned slightly behind the plush toy, creating a playful and inviting atmosphere.
